content:
{
  "questions": [
    {
      "question": "What is the primary use of memoization in dynamic programming?",
      "options": ["To improve the time complexity of a recursive algorithm", "To reduce memory usage by storing intermediate results", "Both A and B", "Neither A nor B"],
      "correct": 1,
      "explanation": "Memoization is used to store the results of expensive function calls and reuse them when the same inputs occur again, thus improving the time complexity of a recursive algorithm.
